question: Are these courses self-paced or do they have schedules?
answer: All courses on EduSphere are 100% self-paced. Once enrolled, you gain lifetime access to all learning materials, curriculum updates, and code repositories, allowing you to learn on your own schedule.

question: Can I obtain certificates for completed courses?
answer: Yes! When you complete 100% of the lessons in any course, a digital certificate is automatically generated. You can download it as a PDF or add it to your LinkedIn profile.

question: Is there a refund policy if I am not satisfied?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all course enrollments. If you find the course isn't a fit for you, simply request a refund from your student dashboard, and we'll credit you back in full, no questions asked.

question: Can I access courses offline or on mobile?
answer: Absolutely. Our web application is optimized for mobile browser access. You can watch videos, read files, and write comments smoothly from any mobile device or tablet.
